parameters.name: groupa
parameters.label: Group A
parameters.description: Subset of NURBS and Bezier surfaces. Accepts patterns, as described in .

parameters.name: groupb
parameters.label: Group B
parameters.description: Subset of NURBS and Bezier surfaces to intersect with A. Accepts patterns, as described in .

parameters.name: tol3d
parameters.label: 3D Tolerance
parameters.description: World space precision of the intersection.

parameters.name: step
parameters.label: Marching Steps
parameters.description: Number of steps for tracing each profile span.

parameters.name: boolop
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Select from the following operations: , , , , or .

parameters.name: insidea
parameters.label: Keep Inside A
parameters.description: Preserve the inside sections of the A surfaces.

parameters.name: insideb
parameters.label: Keep Inside B
parameters.description: Preserve the inside sections of the B surfaces.

parameters.name: outsidea
parameters.label: Keep Outside A
parameters.description: Preserve the outside sections of the A surfaces.

parameters.name: outsideb
parameters.label: Keep Outside B
parameters.description: Preserve the outside sections of the B surfaces.

parameters.name: target
parameters.label: Target
parameters.description: Which surface to output profiles for: A, B, or both.

parameters.name: creategroupa
parameters.label: A Profiles Group
parameters.description: Place the A profiles in a user-defined group.

parameters.name: creategroupb
parameters.label:
** (`profilesa`) - Type: ParStr
The name assigned to profile group A.

**B Profiles Group
parameters.description: Place the B profiles in a user-defined group.

parameters.name: mindholes
parameters.label:
** (`profilesb`) - Type: ParStr
The name assigned to profile group B.

**Avoid Already Trimmed-Out Parts
parameters.description: Intersect only the visible surface parts and truncate the intersection profile at the trimmed-in surface boundaries.

parameters.name: join
parameters.label: Join Profiles Created by Multiple Surfaces
parameters.description: If a surface has several adjacent profiles caused by its intersection with two or more surfaces, the profiles will be joined into a single curve-on-surface.

examples.description: Common settings from 4 real Derivative examples
